---
name: Feature release
about: Use this to outline final aspects before release to production.
title: ''
labels: 'release'
assignees: ''

---

## Release checklist

- [ ] Merged to Staging
- [ ] Manual QA testing of form builder flows completed
- [ ] Manual QA testing of response retrieval scenarios completed
- [ ] All content is completely bilingual in English and French
- [ ] Testing from form filler perspective completed
- [ ] Multiple modalities covered (devices, browsers, keyboard, screenreader)
- [ ] Policy documentation (ToU, SLA, T&C) updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Guidance updated (if needed)
- [ ] ATO documentation / Risk register updated (if needed)
- [ ] Features page and strategic roadmap updated
- [ ] Release comms drafted
- [ ] Mailing list recipient list prepared
- [ ] Support team briefed
- [ ] Timing decided for release to production
- [ ] Feature flag turned on in production
- [ ] Flows are tested post-release

## Considerations

- Is downtime needed?
- Is it backward compatible?
- How will people in the midst of building or filling a form be affected?
- Are there dependencies between the app, API or infrastructure?
